calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Arb Award
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JEFFERIES AND COMPANY, INC'S PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Mark D. Campbell (in court) (310.282.2273) and Alyson Weiss (via Court Call) (212.407.4188)of Loeb & Loeb LLP for petitioner and moving party; Michael J. Baker of Howard Rice (434.1600) for defendant Enable; Allan N. Taffet of Duval & Stachenfeld LLP (212.672.3765) via Court Call for defendant Credit Suisse Securities.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
-------------------------------------------------------------------
After hearing the court ruled as follows: denied. Petitioner has not met its burden to show that the panel exceeded its powers. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order.
Parties were informed of the ruling by phone on June 1,2011.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Arb Award
Off Calendar May-19-2011 Continued To May-31-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

PETITIONER JEFFERIES AND COMPANY, INC.'S PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 05/31/11 at 9:30am for oral argument. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
